$description: Per-Machine Detail Dashboard. Maschine-typ-agnostisch — alle BDE-Spalten existieren immer. $machine_id-Picker oben, alles unten reagiert. Drilldown zum Process-Deep-Dive macht der Generator je nach machine_type (CNC → process-cnc, SGM → process-sgm).
title: Machine Detail

variables.name: machine_id
variables.query: SELECT DISTINCT machine_id FROM bde_data ORDER BY 1

queries.status: SELECT machine_status, machine_status_text FROM bde_data WHERE machine_id='$machine_id' ORDER BY cycle_timestamp DESC LIMIT 1
queries.production_order: SELECT production_order FROM bde_data WHERE machine_id='$machine_id' AND production_order IS NOT NULL ORDER BY cycle_timestamp DESC LIMIT 1
queries.article: SELECT article_id FROM bde_data WHERE machine_id='$machine_id' AND article_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY cycle_timestamp DESC LIMIT 1
queries.tool: SELECT tool_id FROM bde_data WHERE machine_id='$machine_id' AND tool_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY cycle_timestamp DESC LIMIT 1
queries.operator: SELECT operator_id FROM bde_data WHERE machine_id='$machine_id' AND operator_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY cycle_timestamp DESC LIMIT 1
queries.shift: SELECT shift_number FROM bde_data WHERE machine_id='$machine_id' AND shift_number IS NOT NULL ORDER BY cycle_timestamp DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: OEE
panels.query: SELECT ROUND((quality*performance*availability*100)::numeric,1) AS value FROM oee_hourly_v5 WHERE machine_id='$machine_id' ORDER BY bucket DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Quality
panels.query: SELECT ROUND((quality*100)::numeric,1) AS value FROM oee_hourly_v5 WHERE machine_id='$machine_id' ORDER BY bucket DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Performance
panels.query: SELECT ROUND((performance*100)::numeric,1) AS value FROM oee_hourly_v5 WHERE machine_id='$machine_id' ORDER BY bucket DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Availability
panels.query: SELECT ROUND((availability*100)::numeric,1) AS value FROM oee_hourly_v5 WHERE machine_id='$machine_id' ORDER BY bucket DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Good
panels.query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(good_parts),0) FROM bde_data WHERE machine_id='$machine_id' AND cycle_timestamp::date = CURRENT_DATE

panels.title: Scrap
panels.query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(scrap_parts),0) FROM bde_data WHERE machine_id='$machine_id' AND cycle_timestamp::date = CURRENT_DATE

panels.title: Rework
panels.query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(rework_parts),0) FROM bde_data WHERE machine_id='$machine_id' AND cycle_timestamp::date = CURRENT_DATE

panels.title: Cycle (avg)
panels.query: SELECT ROUND(AVG(cycle_time_actual)::numeric,1) FROM bde_data WHERE machine_id='$machine_id' AND cycle_timestamp::date = CURRENT_DATE

panels.title: Machine Status
panels.query: SELECT cycle_timestamp AS time, machine_status_text AS state FROM bde_data WHERE machine_id='$machine_id' AND cycle_timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' ORDER BY cycle_timestamp

panels.title: OEE Trend (7d)
panels.query: SELECT bucket AS time, (quality*performance*availability*100) AS "OEE %", (quality*100) AS "Quality %", (performance*100) AS "Performance %", (availability*100) AS "Availability %" FROM oee_hourly_v5 WHERE machine_id='$machine_id' AND bucket > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' ORDER BY bucket

panels.title: Energy
panels.query: SELECT cycle_timestamp AS time, power_kw AS "Power kW" FROM bde_data WHERE machine_id='$machine_id' AND cycle_timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' ORDER BY cycle_timestamp

panels.title: Tool Wear
panels.query: SELECT act_pct_toolwear AS value FROM cnc_process_data WHERE machine_id='$machine_id' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Life Remaining
panels.query: SELECT act_time_toolliferemaining AS value FROM cnc_process_data WHERE machine_id='$machine_id' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1

drilldownButtons.label: Process Deep-Dive
drilldownButtons.fromVariable: SELECT process_table FROM machine_index WHERE machine_id='$machine_id'
